of quality

We deliver research peptides with verified >98% purity. We work with certified laboratories so you can focus on your research.

Dispatch

Mission

Why we exist

We believe that access to high-quality research reagents should be simple, fast, and affordable. Too many researchers waste time searching for reliable suppliers.

PEPTIVEX LABS fills this gap — every product is HPLC tested, carefully packaged, and delivered within 1-3 days via InPost. No compromises on quality.

Certificate of analysis for every batch
Discreet packaging with temperature control
Secure Stripe payments (PCI DSS Level 1)
InPost delivery in Poland and UK

>98%

HPLC Purity

Process

From synthesis to delivery

01

Step 1

SPPS Synthesis

Peptides synthesized using Solid Phase Peptide Synthesis in a certified laboratory.

02

Step 2

HPLC Purification

Liquid chromatography ensures purity above 98%. Certificate of analysis for each batch.

03

Step 3

Lyophilization

Freeze-drying produces a stable powder ready for long-term storage.

04

Step 4

Shipping

Discreet packaging, temperature control, InPost Paczkomaty / Lockers.

Advantages

Why PEPTIVEX LABS?

Purity >98%

Every batch HPLC tested. Certificate of Analysis on request.

Temperature Control

Products stored and shipped under controlled temperature conditions.

Fast Delivery

InPost Lockers (UK) and Paczkomaty (PL). Discreet packaging, 24h dispatch.

Secure Payments

Stripe — cards, BLIK, P24. Full PCI DSS Level 1 encryption.

Scientific Documentation

Every product with description, specification, and scientific publication references.

Wide Selection

19 peptides in 9 categories: regenerative, metabolic, anti-aging, cognitive and more.

Order research peptides

>98% purity, HPLC certificate, fast InPost delivery.
